summary: Frontend-only retest after adding expo-audio SFX + BGM and mute-toggle-button. All 9 requested flows PASS. No runtime errors related to expo-audio/require. Game loads, character selection works, HUD shows both mute and pause buttons, mute icon toggles 🔊↔🔇, jump works without crash, score increments (reached 000011 in ~1.5s), pause overlay works with resume + quit-to-menu. Code review confirms all 4 sounds are correctly wired in /app/frontend/app/game.tsx (jumpPlayer in handleJump lines 313/317, collectPlayer on book pickup line 204, hitPlayer on stomp line 217 and side-hit line 230, bgmPlayer with loop=true + play() in mount useEffect lines 90/95 and paused on unmount line 99, on game-over line 324, on pause line 366).

issues: Deprecation warnings in console: 'textShadow*' style props deprecated (use textShadow) and 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated' (use style.pointerEvents). Non-blocking but should be cleaned up in future pass.

action_items: (Optional cleanup) Migrate textShadowColor/textShadowOffset/textShadowRadius to new textShadow shorthand to silence RN web deprecation warnings.
(Optional cleanup) Replace pointerEvents='none'/'box-none' props with style={{ pointerEvents: ... }} to silence deprecation warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: Audio wiring verified: jump SFX on single + double jump, collect SFX on book, hit SFX on stomp & damage, BGM loop started in mount and correctly paused on unmount/pause/gameover/mute and resumed on unpause/unmute/restart. Implementation matches request.
Browser autoplay policy may delay BGM until first user gesture — expected web behavior, verified the app does not crash and all interactions continue to work.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 2 confirmed audio feature (expo-audio hooks + mute toggle) integrates cleanly. Title→character-select→game flow, HUD, jump, pause/resume, score increment all verified via Playwright at mobile viewport 375x667. Only console noise is RN-web style deprecation warnings (non-blocking). If re-testing audio behaviour on-device, remember useAudioPlayer SFX on web is subject to autoplay gating until the first user interaction.
rca_of_issue: N/A — no bugs found in this iteration.
